elements.description: ห้องน้ำ 1, floor level box '3 +0.50 2' matching the plan view
Triangle '2' and hexagon '3' tagged callouts at high level on the walls, tiled surface shown throughout
granite/tiled counter with mirror (M.) and LAV.1 basin, right-center of section
WC.1 toilet shown in elevation, center-left of section, with HS./PH. fittings beside it
A stepped threshold/floor-level change is drawn at the base of the section on both sides (small step profile), consistent with the +0.50 room level relative to adjoining spaces

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_wc1_plan.json.

The dense dimension chains on both the width (bottom: 0.45/0.45/0.90/0.85/0.85/0.40, brackets 2.60/3.00) and height (right side: 0.70/1.00/0.20/0.20/0.80/0.60) sides were not individually attributed to specific counter/mirror/ceiling features at this resolution -- recorded as flat sets rather than guessed.
This is the final view on the WC.1-dedicated sheet (A-15 of 26 total architecture sheets); confirms this house uses one dedicated expansion sheet per bathroom (A-15=WC.1, A-16=WC.2, A-17=WC.3).
